name: rsbuild-plugin-inertia
description: Rsbuild plugin for Inertia.js page resolution and SSR build support.

scripts.check:js: tsc --allowJs --checkJs --noEmit --skipLibCheck --target ES2022 --module commonjs --noImplicitAny index.js lib/*.js tests/*.js

author: Kelvin Omereshone Oghenerhoro <kelvin@sailscasts.com>
